sentences.sentence: William Henry Perkin was born on March 12, 1838, in London, England.
sentences.translation: 威廉·亨利·珀金于1838年3月12日出生在英国伦敦。

structure.text: William Henry Perkin
was born
on March 12, 1838, in London, England

difficult_points: was born 是被动结构，表示出生。
两个介词短语分别说明日期和地点。

sentences.sentence: As a boy, Perkin's curiosity prompted early interests in the arts, sciences, photography, and engineering.
sentences.translation: 孩童时期，珀金的好奇心促使他早早对艺术、科学、摄影和工程产生兴趣。

structure.text: As a boy
Perkin's curiosity
prompted early interests in the arts, sciences, photography, and engineering

difficult_points: As a boy 是时间背景状语。
prompt sb to do 的这里用 prompt + 名词，表示促成兴趣。

sentences.sentence: But it was a chance stumbling upon a run-down, yet functional, laboratory in his late grandfather's home that solidified the young man's enthusiasm for chemistry.
sentences.translation: 但正是一次偶然发现——在已故祖父家中找到一间破旧却仍能使用的实验室——坚定了这个年轻人对化学的热情。

structure.text: it was a chance stumbling upon a run-down, yet functional, laboratory in his late grandfather's home that solidified the young man's enthusiasm for chemistry
a chance stumbling upon a run-down, yet functional, laboratory in his late grandfather's home
that solidified the young man's enthusiasm for chemistry

difficult_points: It was...that... 是强调句，强调偶然发现实验室这一事件。
run-down 与 functional 由 yet 连接，表示破旧但仍可用。

sentences.sentence: As a student at the City of London School, Perkin became immersed in the study of chemistry.
sentences.translation: 在伦敦市学校读书时，珀金沉浸于化学学习之中。

structure.text: As a student at the City of London School
Perkin
became immersed in the study of chemistry

difficult_points: become immersed in 表示沉浸于。
As a student 是时间和身份背景。

sentences.sentence: His talent and devotion to the subject were perceived by his teacher, Thomas Hall, who encouraged him to attend a series of lectures given by the eminent scientist Michael Faraday at the Royal Institution.
sentences.translation: 他的老师托马斯·霍尔注意到了他的天赋和对这门学科的投入，并鼓励他去听著名科学家迈克尔·法拉第在皇家学会所作的一系列讲座。

structure.text: His talent and devotion to the subject
were perceived by his teacher, Thomas Hall
who encouraged him to attend a series of lectures given by the eminent scientist Michael Faraday at the Royal Institution
given by the eminent scientist Michael Faraday at the Royal Institution

difficult_points: who 修饰 Thomas Hall；given by... 修饰 lectures。
encourage sb to do 表示鼓励某人做某事。

sentences.sentence: Those speeches fired the young chemist's enthusiasm further, and he later went on to attend the Royal College of Chemistry, which he succeeded in entering in 1853, at the age of 15.
sentences.translation: 那些演讲进一步点燃了年轻化学家的热情；后来他进入皇家化学学院，1853年、15岁时成功入学。

structure.text: Those speeches fired the young chemist's enthusiasm further
and he later went on to attend the Royal College of Chemistry
which he succeeded in entering in 1853, at the age of 15

difficult_points: fire enthusiasm 是点燃热情的比喻表达。
which 修饰 Royal College of Chemistry；succeed in 后接动名词 entering。

sentences.sentence: At the time of Perkin's enrolment, the Royal College of Chemistry was headed by the noted German chemist August Wilhelm Hofmann.
sentences.translation: 珀金入学时，皇家化学学院由著名德国化学家奥古斯特·威廉·霍夫曼领导。

structure.text: At the time of Perkin's enrolment
the Royal College of Chemistry
was headed by the noted German chemist August Wilhelm Hofmann

difficult_points: was headed by 是被动语态，表示由某人领导。
At the time of... 表示在某事件发生时。

sentences.sentence: Perkin's scientific gifts soon caught Hofmann's attention and, within two years, he became Hofmann's youngest assistant.
sentences.translation: 珀金的科学天赋很快引起霍夫曼的注意，两年内他就成了霍夫曼最年轻的助理。

structure.text: Perkin's scientific gifts soon caught Hofmann's attention
within two years
he became Hofmann's youngest assistant

difficult_points: catch someone's attention 表示引起某人注意。
within two years 表示在两年之内。

sentences.sentence: Not long after that, Perkin made the scientific breakthrough that would bring him both fame and fortune.
sentences.translation: 不久之后，珀金取得了将为他带来名声和财富的科学突破。

structure.text: Not long after that
Perkin made the scientific breakthrough
that would bring him both fame and fortune

difficult_points: that 修饰 scientific breakthrough。
both...and... 表示名声与财富两者。

sentences.sentence: At the time, quinine was the only viable medical treatment for malaria.
sentences.translation: 当时，奎宁是治疗疟疾唯一可行的药物。

structure.text: At the time
quinine
was the only viable medical treatment for malaria

difficult_points: viable 表示可行、有效，而非仅仅存在。
for malaria 说明 treatment 针对的疾病。

sentences.sentence: The drug is derived from the bark of the cinchona tree, native to South America, and by 1856, demand for the drug was surpassing the available supply.
sentences.translation: 这种药物提取自原产于南美洲的金鸡纳树树皮；到1856年，对该药的需求已超过可供应量。

structure.text: The drug is derived from the bark of the cinchona tree
native to South America
and by 1856, demand for the drug was surpassing the available supply

difficult_points: native to South America 修饰 cinchona tree。
be derived from 表示提取自；was surpassing 表示需求正在超过供应。

sentences.sentence: Thus, when Hofmann made some passing comments about the desirability of a synthetic substitute for quinine, it was unsurprising that his star pupil was moved to take up the challenge.
sentences.translation: 因此，当霍夫曼随口谈到合成奎宁替代品的理想性时，他的得意门生受到激励、接受挑战就不足为奇了。

structure.text: Thus
when Hofmann made some passing comments about the desirability of a synthetic substitute for quinine
it was unsurprising
that his star pupil was moved to take up the challenge

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语。
be moved to do 表示受到感动或激励而做某事。

sentences.sentence: During his vacation in 1856, Perkin spent his time in the laboratory on the top floor of his family's house.
sentences.translation: 1856年假期期间，珀金在自家房屋顶层的实验室里度过了时光。

structure.text: During his vacation in 1856
Perkin spent his time in the laboratory on the top floor of his family's house

difficult_points: on the top floor 修饰 laboratory 的位置。
spend time in 表示在某处度过时间。

sentences.sentence: He was attempting to manufacture quinine from aniline, an inexpensive and readily available coal tar waste product.
sentences.translation: 他试图用苯胺制造奎宁，苯胺是一种廉价且容易获得的煤焦油废料。

structure.text: He
was attempting to manufacture quinine from aniline
an inexpensive and readily available coal tar waste product

difficult_points: was attempting 表示当时正在尝试。
aniline 后的同位语解释其性质和来源。

sentences.sentence: Despite his best efforts, however, he did not end up with quinine.
sentences.translation: 然而，尽管他竭尽全力，最终并没有得到奎宁。

structure.text: Despite his best efforts
however
he did not end up with quinine

difficult_points: Despite 引导让步介词短语。
end up with 表示最终得到某结果。

sentences.sentence: Instead, he produced a mysterious dark sludge.
sentences.translation: 相反，他制成了一种神秘的深色淤泥。

structure.text: Instead
he
produced a mysterious dark sludge

difficult_points: Instead 表示结果与预期相反。
dark sludge 是 produced 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: Luckily, Perkin's scientific training and nature prompted him to investigate the substance further.
sentences.translation: 幸运的是，珀金的科学训练和本性促使他进一步研究这种物质。

structure.text: Luckily
Perkin's scientific training and nature
prompted him to investigate the substance further

difficult_points: prompt sb to do 表示促使某人做某事。
training 和 nature 是并列主语。

sentences.sentence: Incorporating potassium dichromate and alcohol into the aniline at various stages of the experimental process, he finally produced a deep purple solution.
sentences.translation: 在实验过程的不同阶段把重铬酸钾和酒精加入苯胺后，他终于制成了深紫色溶液。

structure.text: Incorporating potassium dichromate and alcohol into the aniline at various stages of the experimental process
he finally produced a deep purple solution

difficult_points: Incorporating 分词短语的逻辑主语是 he。
at various stages 说明加入材料的时间阶段。

sentences.sentence: And, proving the truth of the famous scientist Louis Pasteur's words 'chance favours only the prepared mind', Perkin saw the potential of his unexpected find.
sentences.translation: 而且，珀金看到了这一意外发现的潜力，证明了著名科学家路易·巴斯德‘机会只青睐有准备的头脑’这句话的道理。

structure.text: proving the truth of the famous scientist Louis Pasteur's words 'chance favours only the prepared mind'
Perkin saw the potential of his unexpected find

difficult_points: proving 分词短语表示珀金的发现所证明的结果。
chance favours... 是 words 的直接引用。

sentences.sentence: Historically, textile dyes were made from such natural sources as plants and animal excretions.
sentences.translation: 历史上，纺织染料由植物和动物排泄物等天然来源制成。

structure.text: Historically
textile dyes
were made from such natural sources as plants and animal excretions

difficult_points: were made from 是被动语态。
such...as... 表示‘诸如……这样的’。

sentences.sentence: Some of these, such as the glandular mucus of snails, were difficult to obtain and outrageously expensive.
sentences.translation: 其中一些来源（如蜗牛的腺体黏液）很难获得，而且贵得离谱。

structure.text: Some of these
such as the glandular mucus of snails
were difficult to obtain and outrageously expensive

difficult_points: such as 短语举例说明 some of these。
difficult to obtain 与 expensive 是并列表语。

sentences.sentence: Indeed, the purple colour extracted from a snail was once so costly that in society at the time only the rich could afford it.
sentences.translation: 事实上，从蜗牛中提取的紫色染料曾经昂贵到当时只有富人买得起。

structure.text: Indeed
the purple colour extracted from a snail
extracted from a snail
was once so costly that in society at the time only the rich could afford it

difficult_points: so...that... 表示结果；extracted 修饰 purple colour。
only the rich 中 rich 是形容词名词化，指富人。

sentences.sentence: Further, natural dyes tended to be muddy in hue and fade quickly.
sentences.translation: 此外，天然染料的色调往往浑浊，而且很快褪色。

structure.text: Further
natural dyes
tended to be muddy in hue and fade quickly

difficult_points: tend to do 表示往往会。
be muddy in hue 与 fade quickly 是并列谓语。

sentences.sentence: It was against this backdrop that Perkin's discovery was made.
sentences.translation: 正是在这样的背景下，珀金的发现诞生了。

structure.text: It was against this backdrop that Perkin's discovery was made
against this backdrop
that Perkin's discovery was made

difficult_points: It was...that... 是强调句，强调发现发生的背景。
was made 是被动语态，表示发现被实现或取得。

sentences.sentence: Perkin quickly grasped that his purple solution could be used to colour fabric, thus making it the world's first synthetic dye.
sentences.translation: 珀金很快意识到，他的紫色溶液可以用来给织物染色，从而使其成为世界上第一种合成染料。

structure.text: Perkin quickly grasped
that his purple solution could be used to colour fabric
thus making it the world's first synthetic dye

difficult_points: that 引导 grasped 的宾语从句。
thus making 是结果分词结构，it 指 purple solution。

sentences.sentence: Realising the importance of this breakthrough, he lost no time in patenting it.
sentences.translation: 意识到这一突破的重要性后，他立即为它申请了专利。

structure.text: Realising the importance of this breakthrough
he lost no time in patenting it

difficult_points: Realising 分词短语的逻辑主语是 he。
lose no time in doing 表示立即做某事。

sentences.sentence: But perhaps the most fascinating of all Perkin's reactions to his find was his nearly instant recognition that the new dye had commercial possibilities.
sentences.translation: 但珀金对这一发现最引人入胜的反应，或许是他几乎立即意识到这种新染料具有商业潜力。

structure.text: the most fascinating of all Perkin's reactions to his find
was
his nearly instant recognition that the new dye had commercial possibilities
that the new dye had commercial possibilities

difficult_points: of all 强化最高级；that 从句是 recognition 的同位内容。
commercial possibilities 指商业化前景。

sentences.sentence: Perkin originally named his dye Tyrian Purple, but it later became commonly known as mauve (from the French for the plant used to make the colour violet).
sentences.translation: 珀金最初把这种染料命名为Tyrian Purple，但后来它通常被称为mauve（名称来自法语中一种用来制造紫罗兰色的植物）。

structure.text: Perkin originally named his dye Tyrian Purple
but it later became commonly known as mauve
from the French for the plant used to make the colour violet
used to make the colour violet

difficult_points: name A B 表示给A命名为B。
became known as 是‘后来被称为’；used to make 修饰 plant。

sentences.sentence: He asked advice of Scottish dye works owner Robert Pullar, who assured him that manufacturing the dye would be well worth it if the colour remained fast (i.e. would not fade) and the cost was relatively low.
sentences.translation: 他向苏格兰染坊老板罗伯特·普勒请教，对方向他保证，如果颜色持久且成本相对较低，生产这种染料将非常值得。

structure.text: He asked advice of Scottish dye works owner Robert Pullar
who assured him that manufacturing the dye would be well worth it
if the colour remained fast (i.e. would not fade) and the cost was relatively low

difficult_points: who 修饰 Robert Pullar；that 从句作 assured 的宾语。
if 从句给出值得生产的条件，manufacturing 是动名词主语。

sentences.sentence: So, over the fierce objections of his mentor Hofmann, he left college to give birth to the modern chemical industry.
sentences.translation: 因此，尽管导师霍夫曼强烈反对，他还是离开了学院，开创了现代化学工业。

structure.text: over the fierce objections of his mentor Hofmann
he left college
to give birth to the modern chemical industry

difficult_points: over objections 表示不顾反对。
give birth to 是比喻表达，表示开创。

sentences.sentence: With the help of his father and brother, Perkin set up a factory not far from London.
sentences.translation: 在父亲和兄弟的帮助下，珀金在离伦敦不远处建立了一家工厂。

structure.text: With the help of his father and brother
Perkin set up a factory not far from London

difficult_points: With the help of 表示借助某人的帮助。
not far from London 修饰 factory 的位置。

sentences.sentence: Utilising the cheap and plentiful coal tar that was an almost unlimited byproduct of London's gas street lighting, the dye works began producing the world's first synthetically dyed material in 1857.
sentences.translation: 染坊利用廉价而丰富的煤焦油——伦敦街道燃气照明几乎无限的副产品——于1857年开始生产世界上第一批合成染色材料。

structure.text: Utilising the cheap and plentiful coal tar that was an almost unlimited byproduct of London's gas street lighting
that was an almost unlimited byproduct of London's gas street lighting
the dye works began producing the world's first synthetically dyed material in 1857

difficult_points: Utilising 分词短语的逻辑主语是 the dye works。
that 修饰 coal tar；begin producing 后接动名词。

sentences.sentence: The company received a commercial boost from the Empress Eugénie of France, when she decided the new colour flattered her.
sentences.translation: 法国皇后欧仁妮认为这种新颜色很衬她，为公司带来了商业上的推动。

structure.text: The company received a commercial boost from the Empress Eugénie of France
when she decided the new colour flattered her
the new colour flattered her

difficult_points: when 从句说明商业推动发生的契机。
flatter 在此表示颜色使人显得好看。

sentences.sentence: Very soon, mauve was the necessary shade for all the fashionable ladies in that country.
sentences.translation: 很快，mauve 就成了那个国家所有时髦女士必备的颜色。

structure.text: Very soon
mauve
was the necessary shade for all the fashionable ladies in that country

difficult_points: necessary shade 表示必备色调。
in that country 修饰 fashionable ladies。

sentences.sentence: Not to be outdone, England's Queen Victoria also appeared in public wearing a mauve gown, thus making it all the rage in England as well.
sentences.translation: 为了不落后，英国维多利亚女王也穿着mauve礼服公开亮相，从而使它在英国同样风靡一时。

structure.text: Not to be outdone
England's Queen Victoria also appeared in public wearing a mauve gown
thus making it all the rage in England as well

difficult_points: Not to be outdone 表示‘为了不被比下去’。
wearing 分词短语说明亮相时的状态；thus making 表示结果。

sentences.sentence: The dye was bold and fast, and the public clamoured for more.
sentences.translation: 这种染料颜色鲜明且不褪色，公众争相要求更多。

structure.text: The dye was bold and fast
and the public clamoured for more

difficult_points: fast 在染料语境中表示颜色牢固、不褪色。
clamour for 表示大声要求或争相索要。

sentences.sentence: Perkin went back to the drawing board.
sentences.translation: 珀金回到起点重新设计和研究。

structure.text: Perkin
went back to the drawing board

difficult_points: go back to the drawing board 是习语，表示重新开始、重新设计。
不是字面上的回到画板。

expressions.text: go back to the drawing board

sentences.sentence: Although Perkin's fame was achieved and fortune assured by his first discovery, the chemist continued his research.
sentences.translation: 尽管第一次发现使珀金获得了名声并确保了财富，这位化学家仍继续研究。

structure.text: Although Perkin's fame was achieved and fortune assured by his first discovery
the chemist continued his research

difficult_points: Although 从句中 fame was achieved 与 fortune assured 是并列被动结构，后者省略 was。
by his first discovery 表示原因或手段。

sentences.sentence: Among other dyes he developed and introduced were aniline red (1859) and aniline black (1863) and, in the late 1860s, Perkin's green.
sentences.translation: 他开发并推出的其他染料包括苯胺红（1859年）、苯胺黑（1863年）以及19世纪60年代末的珀金绿。

structure.text: Among other dyes he developed and introduced
he developed and introduced
were aniline red (1859) and aniline black (1863) and, in the late 1860s, Perkin's green

difficult_points: Among...置于句首引起主谓倒装，were 提前。
he developed and introduced 是省略关系代词的定语从句。

sentences.sentence: It is important to note that Perkin's synthetic dye discoveries had outcomes far beyond the merely decorative.
sentences.translation: 需要注意的是，珀金的合成染料发现产生的影响远远超出了单纯装饰用途。

structure.text: It is important to note
that Perkin's synthetic dye discoveries had outcomes far beyond the merely decorative

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正内容。
far beyond 表示远远超出；the decorative 是形容词名词化。

expressions.text: it is important to note that

sentences.sentence: The dyes also became vital to medical research in many ways.
sentences.translation: 这些染料还在许多方面成为医学研究不可或缺的工具。

structure.text: The dyes
also became vital to medical research in many ways

difficult_points: be vital to 表示对……至关重要。
in many ways 是方式状语。

sentences.sentence: For instance, they were used to stain previously invisible microbes and bacteria, allowing researchers to identify such bacilli as tuberculosis, cholera, and anthrax.
sentences.translation: 例如，它们被用来给此前不可见的微生物和细菌染色，使研究人员能够识别出结核病、霍乱和炭疽等杆菌。

structure.text: For instance
they were used to stain previously invisible microbes and bacteria
allowing researchers to identify such bacilli as tuberculosis, cholera, and anthrax
to identify such bacilli as tuberculosis, cholera, and anthrax

difficult_points: were used to stain 是被动语态加目的不定式。
allowing 分词短语说明染色带来的结果；such...as... 用于举例。

sentences.sentence: Artificial dyes continue to play a crucial role today.
sentences.translation: 人工染料如今仍继续发挥关键作用。

structure.text: Artificial dyes
continue to play a crucial role today

difficult_points: continue to do 表示持续做某事。
play a crucial role in 是固定搭配，此处省略 in 后的领域。

sentences.sentence: And, in what would have been particularly pleasing to Perkin, their current use is in the search for a vaccine against malaria.
sentences.translation: 而且，珀金尤其会感到欣慰的是，如今这些染料被用于寻找抗疟疾疫苗。

structure.text: in what would have been particularly pleasing to Perkin
what would have been particularly pleasing to Perkin
their current use is in the search for a vaccine against malaria

difficult_points: what 从句作介词 in 的宾语，表示‘会让珀金欣慰的事情’。
would have been 是对过去假设结果的表达；against malaria 修饰 vaccine。
